missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable methylation markers, methylation score, homocysteine, labs, diet history, supplement context, pregnancy context, medication context, detox claims, broader pathway model, StrateGene proprietary scoring, and authenticated Methylation Pathway sample rows explicitly; do not infer pathway status or action. Use sibling StrateGene Folate/MTHFR sample maps, notable-variation rows, dirty/clean headings, and advanced table rows only as observed output-format examples.
